title: Action Not Allowed Details
description: Details payload for ACTION_NOT_ALLOWED errors. Lets buyer SDKs offer a structured recovery path without a separate get_media_buys round-trip.

attempted_action.description: The action the request mapped to, per the normative action-to-field mapping in update_media_buy task-reference.

reason.description: Why the action was rejected. Buyer SDKs branch on this to choose a recovery path.

currently_available_actions.description: Echo of the buy's resolved `available_actions[]` at rejection time. Buyer SDKs render this to the caller as the recovery option set.
